$comment: CLEAN MANIFEST: V15.3.1 / New Theorems and Debt (2026-03-27).

package.name: flu-math
package.full_name: Fractal Logic Unit — Phased Fractal Number Theory
entry: from flu import manifold, generate, traverse, path_coord, path_coord_to_rank, FMDanceIterator
from flu import CommunionEngine, SparseArithmeticManifold, SparseEvenManifold, FLUOperator, ForeignField
from flu import FractalNet, FractalNetKinetic, ScarStore
from flu import get_theorem, status_report, verify_latin
from flu.interfaces import HadamardFacet, GrayCodeFacet, LexiconFacet, IntegrityFacet, GeneticFacet, CohomologyFacet
from flu.applications import ExperimentalDesign, FLUInitializer, LighthouseBeacon

core_identity.summary: Every coordinate in the manifold is a discrete signal processed via integration and permutation.

components.Digits(k): Base-n mixed-radix expansion — The 'Derivative' digit stream.
components.Integrate: FM-Dance Prefix-Sum T-matrix (det=-1) — The 'Discrete Integral' Δ⁻¹.
components.Permute: APN / Golden Seed per-depth rotation — The 'Diffusion' layer.

core_identity.complexity: O(D) addressing, O(1) amortized traversal, O(D) memory footprint.

what_flu_is.one_sentence: FLU is a deterministic combinatorial algebra that generates n^d Latin hyperstructures via Hamiltonian traversal of the toroidal lattice Z_n^D, using a triangular affine transform of radix-n digits.
core_invariants: Latin Property (T3): Each axis-aligned slice is a permutation of digits (Incompressibility).
Hamiltonian Path (T2): Visits every lattice point exactly once without repetition.
Step Bound (T4): Local displacement is bounded by the torus diameter ⌊n/2⌋.
Spectral Vanishing (UNIF-1): Mixed-frequency DFT components are identically zero for all seeds.
what_flu_is.key_property: Self-Referential Manifold (SRM): The coordinate x_k uniquely determines its predecessor x_{k-1} in O(D). No external state needed.
what_flu_is.core_object: A Latin hyperprism M of shape (n,)*d where every 1D axis projection is a permutation of Z_n. Mean-centred (mean = 0 for odd n). Proven bijective.

three_perspectives.matrix: Φ(k) = T·a(k) where T is lower-triangular with det(T) = −1 mod n. Gives O(d) rank→coordinate map.
three_perspectives.kinetic: Φ(k+1) = Φ(k) + σ_{j(k)} where σ_j are step vectors indexed by carry level j. Each step lands on a 'Fractal Fault Line' B_j.
three_perspectives.algebraic: Φ(k) = Φ(0) + Σ_{i<k} σ_{j(i)} — a Hamiltonian walk on the Cayley graph Cay(Z_n^D, S). Invertible by S^{-1}.

what_it_is_not: Not a random or probabilistic generator — fully deterministic.
Not a compression algorithm — though structured state compression is an application.
Not a quantum system — 'qubit' language in early versions was metaphorical, now removed.
Not magic: every claim is either proven or explicitly marked CONJECTURE.

v14.fractal_net: FractalNet(n, d) — FM-Dance radical inverse, OD-27 quasi-Monte Carlo digital net. ~20% lower L2-star discrepancy vs Monte Carlo at N=729.
v14.scar_store: ScarStore(n, d) — Holographic sparse memory over SparseCommunionManifold. Prototype, SIMULATION_ONLY.
v14.apn_zero_compute: unrank_optimal_seed now has zero-compute O(n) path for primes n ≡ 2 mod 3 via proven APN power map x^3.
v14.power_map_obstruction: Algebraic proof that no bijective power map x^d (mod p) is APN for p ≡ 1 mod 3. Closes OD-16-PM / OD-17-PM.
v14.t8b_corrected: T8b statement now cleanly separates PROVEN Gray-1 property from OPEN uniqueness conjecture (OD-19).

v15.interfaces_package: flu.interfaces — 6 facets: LexiconFacet, IntegrityFacet, GeneticFacet, InvarianceFacet, HilbertFacet, CohomologyFacet
v15.had1_theorem: HAD-1 PROVEN: Communion ⊗_XOR generates Sylvester-Hadamard matrices of order 2^D
v15.tsp1_theorem: TSP-1 PROVEN: FM-Dance = optimal TSP + O(D) routing oracle on uniform Cayley graphs
v15.crypto1_theorem: CRYPTO-1 PROVEN: APN seeds over Z_p provide structural immunity to binary differential cryptanalysis
v15.lexicon_facet: LEX-1 PROVEN: Bijective n-ary alphanumeric mapping Λ: Z_n^D → Σ* preserving T1 bijection
v15.integrity_facet: INT-1 PROVEN: O(1) L1 conservative-law sonde for Byzantine fault detection
v15.genetic_facet: GEN-1 PROVEN: SHA-256 hashed APN seed reservoirs for cross-substrate algebraic parity
v15.invariance_facet: INV-1 PROVEN: Structural isomorphism regression — P_odd ≅ P_even under {T3,L1,L2,S1}
v15.hilbert_facet: HIL-1 RETIRED: FM-Dance + RotationHub Hilbert locality — RETIRED V15.1.3 (n=2 self-contradiction)
v15.cohomology_facet: DEC-1 PROVEN: ScarStore = coset decomposition C⁰(Z_n^D;Z_n) / SCM (Künneth + HM-1)

v15_2.oper_1_arithmetic_stack: Functional Calculus for lattices: lazy pointwise algebra (+, -, *, /) with O(D·depth) resolution.
v15_2.lattice_convergence: T10 PROVEN: Identity (Corput) and Kinetic (T-matrix) nets converge to the same point set at N = n^{2d}.
v15_2.recursive_embedding: C5 PROVEN: Latin property invariant under arbitrary tensor-product nesting (Hyper-Torus).
v15_2.lineage_anchoring: GEN-0 (2017 Siamese Origin) and YM-1 (Danielic Ten 6+4 Orbit Sum) seated as proven roots.
v15_2.spectral_unification: UNIF-1 PROVEN: Unified proof of spectral vanishing for all sum-separable arrays via character orthogonality.
v15_2.od27_conjecture: OD-27 formal conjecture entry: (t,2k,2k)-net classification of FractalNet. Proof sketch in 4 steps following Niederreiter 1992. Conjectured t=0 for kinetic variant.
v15_2.benchmark_suite: tests/benchmarks/run_benchmark_suite.py — 13-section automated pipeline covering all modules, interfaces, applications, and OD-27 specific QMC measurements. CI-compatible (exit 0 = clean).
v15_2.even_n_hyperprism: EVEN-1 PROVEN: Gray-coded XOR micro-block (Z_{2^k}) x sum-mod macro-block (Z_m, m odd) via Kronecker product. SparseEvenManifold O(D) parameter-free oracle; manifold() factory updated. parity_switcher branch: even_kronecker.

v15_3.od19_fully_proven: OD-19 PROVEN/SCOPED: FM-Dance is linear integer orbit family (/docs/PROOF_OD19_LINEAR.mb)
v15_3.dn1_fully_proven: DN1 PROVEN: Proofs and Digital Net Classification (/src/core/lo_shu_sudoku.py)
v15_3.dn2_fully_proven: DN2 PROVEN: all 8 sub-parts closed. FLU-Owen scrambling (mode='owen') is default. (/docs/PROOF_DN2_APN_SCRAMBLING.md)
v15_3.od27_fully_proven: OD-27 PROVEN: Proofs and Digital Net Classification for fractalNet and fractalNetKinetic. (/docs/PROOF_OD27_DIGITAL_NET.md)
v15_3.dn2_etk: DN2-ETK: D*_N ≤ C_classic(D)·(B/√n)^D·(log N)^D/N. Improvement (√n/B)^D: e.g. 11.2× at n=5,D=3.
v15_3.dn2_walsh: DN2-WALSH: |ŵ(k)| ≤ (B/√n)^{μ(k)} — Walsh-native, same constant as ETK.
v15_3.dn2_var: DN2-VAR: Var[I_N] ≤ C·(B/√n)^{2D}·(log N)^{D-1}/N^3. Gain independent of smoothness.
v15_3.dn2_anova: DN2-ANOVA: subset u suppressed by (B/√n)^{2|u|}. Effective dimension halved.
v15_3.api_bug_fix: All scrambling methods fixed: factoradic_unrank(rank,n) used directly, not unrank_optimal_seed(rank,n).
v15_3.golden_seeds_cleanup: GOLDEN_SEEDS[13] cleaned: 16→10 valid APN seeds. APN/δ=3 regime explicitly separated.

v15_3_1.dn1_fully_proven: DN1 PROVEN: LoShu Sudoku Graeco-Latin embedding yields OA(81, 4, 3, 4) and (0,4,4)-net.
v15_3_1.od19_linear_proven: OD-19-LINEAR PROVEN: Linear Magic Hyperprism Uniqueness proven for 246 orbits (D=3).
v15_3_1.t8b_uniqueness_closed: T8b UPDATED: The OD-19 open part is now formally CLOSED by OD-19-LINEAR. FM-Dance is proven as the unique H_D-orbit.

v15.name: Optimal TSP Oracle on Toroidal Lattices

v15_2.name: Convergence of Corput and Kinetic nets
Even-n Latin Hyperprism via Kronecker Decomposition

addressing_and_kinetics.manifold(n, d, sparse=True): Unified factory returning dense arrays or sparse O(D) oracles.
addressing_and_kinetics.path_coord_to_rank(coord, n, d): Coordinate → rank k. O(d). Inverse of path_coord.
addressing_and_kinetics.traverse(n, d, start_k=0): Lazy generator yielding all n^d coordinates in FM-Dance order.
addressing_and_kinetics.traverse_reverse(n, d, start_k=None): Lazy reverse generator using S^{-1} step vectors.

fractal_algebra.ForeignField: Bridge for external non-FLU data into the arithmetic stack.
fractal_algebra.LoShuSudokuHyperCell: 3^4 Graeco-Latin hypercell — OA(81,4,3,4) macro addresses. DN1 PROVEN. Use make_hypercell() or LoShuSudokuHyperCell() directly.
fractal_algebra.SudokuMacroAdapter: Adapter giving LoShuSudokuHyperCell the FLUHyperCell interface for use as macro layer in FractalHyperCell_3_6(generator='sudoku').
fractal_algebra.FractalHyperCell_3_6: 3^6 Recursive Fractal Embedding: macro(3^4) x Lo Shu micro(3^2). generator='sudoku' (default, V15.3.1+, OA(81,4,3,4)) or generator='product' (legacy FM-Dance). Factory: make_sudoku() / make_product().

interface_facets.IntegrityFacet: Stateless O(1) L1-invariant sonde (Byzantine Fault Detection).
interface_facets.LexiconFacet: Bijective alphanumeric address naming: Z_n^D ↔ Σ*.

qmc.FractalNet(n, d): OD-27 quasi-Monte Carlo digital net via FM-Dance radical inverse. (T9, DN2 PROVEN)
qmc.FractalNet.generate(num_points): Points in [0,1)^d with Latin balance at every power-of-n prefix.

seeds.unrank_optimal_seed(k, n, signed=True): Returns k-th APN/PN seed. Zero-compute for n ≡ 2 mod 3. [PFNT-4, OD-16-PM, OD-17-PM]

theory.proven_theorems(): Returns list of all PROVEN TheoremRecord objects.
theory.open_conjectures(): Returns list of all CONJECTURE TheoremRecord objects.

hardware.export_vhdl(n, d, filepath): Generates synthesisable VHDL for FM-Dance addressing logic.

mathematical_lineage.qmc_duality: Van der Corput Duality — FM-Dance as Discrete Integral (DISC-1).
mathematical_lineage.de_la_loubere_1693: D=2 case is exactly the Siamese magic square method (T5 PROVEN).
mathematical_lineage.latin_hypercubes_mckay_1979: FLU generates deterministic Latin hypercubes where standard methods use random permutations.
mathematical_lineage.p_adic_odometer: Time variable k evolves as an m-adic odometer; carry cascade is the p-adic valuation ν_n(k).
mathematical_lineage.cayley_graphs: FM-Dance path is a Hamiltonian walk on Cay(Z_n^D, S) (CGW PROVEN).
mathematical_lineage.digital_nets: FractalNet (OD-27) is a quasi-Monte Carlo digital net (T9 PROVEN). Beats random by ~20% in L2-star discrepancy.
mathematical_lineage.apn_permutations: APN (Almost Perfect Nonlinear) permutations from cryptography used as optimal seeds.
mathematical_lineage.hasse_weil: Algebraic curve argument (Hasse-Weil) proves APN power-map obstruction for p ≡ 1 mod 3 (OD-16-PM, OD-17-PM PROVEN).

benchmarks.$comment: Benchmark results stored in benchmarks/latest.json. Regenerate with: python run_tests.py

for_llm_auditors: 1. Read this file (FLU_MANIFEST.json) — all proven/conjectured claims are here.
2. Read docs/THEOREMS.md — full proof sketches (V14+V15 sections at bottom).
3. Read docs/PERSPECTIVES.md — the three equivalent mathematical views.
4. Read docs/AUDIT_NOTES.md — V14/V15 audit findings in detail.
5. Read docs/PROOF_APN_OBSTRUCTION.md — algebraic proof of OD-16-PM / OD-17-PM.
6. Run: python -c 'import sys; sys.path.insert(0, "src"); import flu; print(flu.status_report())'
7. Query: flu.get_theorem('KIB') for any theorem record.
for_downstream_packages: Primary API: generate(), traverse(), path_coord(), CommunionEngine
Do NOT import from src/flu/core/ directly — use flu.__init__ exports only.

v16_vision: Crystalline Closure: Zero Mathematical Debt. 100% Proven Registry. Boxed 500kb binary-pure runtime.

changelog.summary: FractalHyperCell_3_6 extended: Sudoku generator (default) uses LoShuSudokuHyperCell with OA(81,4,3,4) macro addresses (DN1-OA). SudokuMacroAdapter added. Legacy product generator preserved via generator='product' or explicit macro=FLUHyperCell(). New exports: LoShuSudokuHyperCell, SudokuMacroAdapter, make_sudoku_hypercell. 47 new tests. 769 total tests, 0 failures.
DN1 PROVEN: LoShu Sudoku Graeco-Latin embedding yields OA(81, 4, 3, 4). OD-19-LINEAR PROVEN: Linear digit uniqueness proved for 246 orbits (D=3). Registry updated: 69 PROVEN / 73 total / 2 open.

DN2 FULLY PROVEN: FLU-Owen scrambling architecture + character sum audit + ETK discrepancy constant + Walsh-tight bound + Owen-class variance + ANOVA interaction suppression. 4 new sub-theorems (DN2-ETK/WALSH/VAR/ANOVA). GOLDEN_SEEDS[13] cleaned; API bug (unrank_optimal_seed misuse) fixed. Registry: 65 PROVEN / 70 total / 3 open.

EVEN-1 PROVEN: Even-n Latin Hyperprism via Kronecker Decomposition. SparseEvenManifold registered in __all__. manifold() factory routes even n to SparseEvenManifold. parity_switcher branch label corrected to even_kronecker. Registry: 60 PROVEN / 66 total. 1029 tests passing.

Definitive manifest created, consolidating all proven theorems and breakthroughs. Added core identity, v15.2 breakthroughs, unified theorem registry with 65 entries, and v16 vision. All tests passing.
DEC-1 promoted CONJECTURE→PROVEN. Original (L2=Delta^{-1}) corrected. ScarStore = coset decomposition C^0/SCM, proved from HM-1+Kunneth. 673 tests passing.
new_findings: L2 (Holographic Repair) is NOT Delta^{-1}: different operators (projection vs potential)
ScarStore baseline = H^1 generators via Kunneth (D axis-permutation seeds)
dim(sum-separable) = D*(n-1)+1 verified for n in {3,5,7}, D in {2,3,4}
12 distinct SparseCommunionManifold values for n=3, D=2 confirmed

changelog.summary: DN2 promoted CONJECTURE→PARTIAL. FFT spectral reduction confirmed 26-50% for n≥5. n=3 APN-free finding documented. PAPER.md §3.8+§4.6+§6 updated. All tests passing (673/673).
new_findings: Z_3 has no APN bijection (delta_min=3); GOLDEN_SEEDS[3] are all delta=3
FFT reduction by APN scrambling: n=5→26.5%, n=7→39.3%, n=11→50.1%
L2 discrepancy not improved by APN scrambling at any n tested

changelog.summary: T9 PROVEN via V15 audit: benchmark bug (np.cumsum T[0,0]=+1 vs correct -1) resolved. Perspectives 4 & 5 added (QMC/Faure, Pascal/Discrete Calculus). test_generate_even_n_raises fixed. Header drift in SPRINT.md and handoff.json corrected.
